meaning: n.团,大群v.把...编组,把...编成团,管辖
examples: We were part of an entire regiment that had nothing else to do but to keep that motorway open.
The 5th Regiment bore down on the enemy positions.
One such device was found by Theo while supporting 11 Platoon 1 Royal Irish Regiment.
Prince Philip, who is the regiment's colonel-in-chief, presented it with a new ceremonial flag.
